# Issue ID Prefix

This repo's issue id prefix is **`DXUI`**.

Every issue id in this repo has the shape `DXUI-<N>` (e.g. `DXUI-1`, `DXUI-42`). When skill prose says `<PREFIX>-N`, substitute `DXUI`. When you need a literal example id in a comment or commit message, use a real `DXUI-N` from this repo.
